message:
fix(tui): restore explicit borders on query help popup to fix content truncation

Block::bordered() includes Sides::all(1) padding which reduces the inner
area by 2 extra rows and 2 extra columns compared to the original
Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL). The query help popup's 8-row
height was only large enough for 4 content lines with the extra padding,
causing "Column: subject:deploy" and the close hint to be truncated.

Revert the popup to explicit borders without padding so all 6 help lines
render within the 8-row popup area.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
